summary: Ship the plan to ticket slicing. R-1 now defines and tests an atomic Undo snapshot/restore contract, R-2 specifies the sortable keyboard strategy and smoke path, and R-3 provides a reproducible baseline, measurement method, and blocking threshold. The fixes introduce no new critical issue within the Round 2 scope.
triage: Clean verdict: note it in your report and COMMIT this artifact with the next bookkeeping commit.
